reviews.comment:
Lindo lugar renovado, demoró aprox 1 año eso. Las medialunas muy buenas, no siendo las congeladas de cualquier YPF FULL. Recomendable

(Translated by Google)
Nice renovated place, it took about a year to complete. The croissants are very good, unlike the frozen ones you'd find at any YPF FULL. Recommended.
